llm_result.summary: Intervention levers targeting belonging, authenticity, and energy/exhaustion across work, friends, and family contexts. The 7 modifiable BIO/PSYCHO/SOCIAL predictors address C01–C06 (work/friend/family belonging; masking; exhaustion; global self-concept) with feasible, measurable strategies and cross-domain synergy (e.g., authentic self-expression can boost belonging; sleep/energy supports social engagement; family coaching reduces externally imposed role pressures). Each lever is changeable, non-pharmacological, and accompanied by simple metrics to track impact over roughly 6–16 weeks.

solutions.predictor_variable: Workplace Belonging Enhancement Program (structured peer connection circles, micro-mentoring, inclusivity rituals)
solutions.solution_candidate: Implement a brief, organization-supported Workplace Belonging program: 15–20 minute weekly peer-connection circles, optional mentor-mentee pairs, and inclusive onboarding rituals designed to normalize diverse identities at work.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Directly increases perceived acceptance and visibility at work (C01) and reduces need for inauthentic masking (C04); by decreasing social-exhaustion from role management (C05) and improving self-view in work contexts (C06).
solutions.measurement: Pre/post measures of perceived workplace belonging (C01 proxy), masking frequency at work (C04 proxy), fatigue/energy at work (C05 proxy), and self-worth in work domains (C06 proxy); participation counts and qualitative feedback.
solutions.safety_notes: No safety concerns; monitor workload to avoid over-burdening; provide opt-out options for participants.
solutions.mapping_query: How would a Workplace Belonging program impact C01 (work belonging), C04 (masking at work), C05 (social exhaustion), and C06 (global self-concept at work)?

solutions.predictor_variable: Authentic Self-Expression and Identity Consolidation (values-based action; graded exposure to authentic social interactions)
solutions.solution_candidate: A brief ACT/CBT-based program to reduce masking through values clarification and gradual exposure to authentic social interactions, including journaling and micro-experiments.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Targets masking (C04) and negative self-concept (C06); authentic engagement may indirectly boost workplace/friend/family belonging (C01) via stronger identity-sense alignment.
solutions.measurement: Masking frequency inventory; Self-Concept Clarity scale; belonging measures across contexts; frequency of authentic social exposures.
solutions.safety_notes: None beyond standard CBT/ACT safety; provide opt-out and monitor distress during identity-focused tasks.
solutions.mapping_query: Can values-based exposure to authentic social interactions reduce masking (C04) and improve self-concept (C06), with spillover to belonging (C01)?

solutions.predictor_variable: Family Communication Coaching (structured sessions with family to set expectations and express support)
solutions.solution_candidate: Family systems-focused coaching with psychoeducation to reduce misattunement and family disappointment labels, improving family acceptance.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Directly improves perceived family acceptance (C03) and can reduce internalized negative self-view (C06) by adjusting family narrative and support.
solutions.measurement: Family Acceptance Scale (C03 proxy); Self-worth/self-criticism measures; frequency/quality of supportive family interactions.
solutions.safety_notes: No safety concerns; ensure sessions respect confidentiality and autonomy of family members.
solutions.mapping_query: Will family communication coaching enhance perceived family acceptance (C03) and reduce global non-belonging (C06)?

solutions.solution_candidate: Sleep hygiene program with circadian entrainment and environmental optimization to improve sleep quality and daytime energy.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Better sleep improves daytime energy and mood, increasing capacity and willingness for social engagement (C01/C02); reduces fatigue-related exhaustion (C05).
solutions.measurement: Pittsburgh Sleep Quality Index; Fatigue Severity Scale; energy diaries; simple social engagement logs.
solutions.safety_notes: No safety concerns; monitor for sleep disruption if schedules become irregular.
solutions.mapping_query: Would improved sleep quality and energy (C05) enable greater social participation and belonging (C01/C02)?

solutions.solution_candidate: Dietary pattern adjustments focusing on omega-3 fatty acids, B-vitamins, fiber, and hydration to support neural function and mood.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Nutritional status can influence energy, mood, and cognitive clarity, potentially reducing fatigue and improving social engagement.
solutions.measurement: 3-day food diaries; proxy measures of micronutrient adequacy; Fatigue scale; mood indicators.
solutions.safety_notes: Safe; coordinate with general dietary guidance; avoid restrictive regimens without professional advice.
solutions.mapping_query: Can improved nutrition/micronutrient adequacy (C05) boost energy and mood to support social belonging?

solutions.solution_candidate: Mindfulness-based self-compassion interventions to reduce self-criticism and enhance affect regulation.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Reduces masking behavior by increasing tolerance for authentic reactions (C04) and improves global self-worth (C06) through compassionate self-relating.
solutions.measurement: Self-Compassion Scale; Difficulties in Emotion Regulation Scale; belonging measures across contexts; masking frequency.
solutions.safety_notes: None; ensure appropriate guidance for mindfulness practices; monitor for distress during authentication tasks.
solutions.mapping_query: Will self-compassion and emotion regulation training decrease masking (C04) and improve global belonging/self-concept (C06)?

solutions.solution_candidate: Link to community groups and social-prescribing pathways to broaden social networks and belonging experiences.
solutions.mechanism_rationale: Expands social identities beyond family/friends, increasing perceived belonging across contexts (C01/C02) and potentially enhancing self-worth (C06).
solutions.measurement: Social network size; Belonging scales for different contexts; attendance/participation counts; satisfaction with social life.
solutions.safety_notes: No safety concerns; ensure groups are accessible and inclusive; provide opt-out if group dynamics are unsafe.
solutions.mapping_query: Will community participation and social prescribing increase belonging (C01/C02) and improve self-concept (C06)?
